description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex hip roof featuring multiple chimneys and dormer windows. The facade is symmetrical, with a central entryway flanked by evenly spaced windows and two prominent bay windows on either side. The roof is covered in reddish-brown tiles, and several flat-roofed extensions are visible on the sides and rear. The house has numerous white-framed windows, including both rectangular and bay styles, providing ample natural light. The exterior is primarily red brick, with some stone or concrete trim around the windows and doors. The property is surrounded by a paved area, suggesting a driveway or patio space.
description: A large, red-brick two-story house with a hip roof, multiple chimneys, bay windows, and a symmetrical facade. The house features white-framed windows and several flat-roofed extensions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the house, several chimneys, and a paved area with visible doors and windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting two large bay windows, a central door, and multiple chimneys on the hip roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with flat-roofed extensions, rear doors, and fewer windows compared to the front.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and decorative central dormer.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with decorative trim, steps, and a prominent dormer above
